seoTitle: Pelican Point vs Penfield — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Pelican Point and Penfield. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Pelican Point vs Penfield: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pelican Point and Penfield.
heading: Pelican Point vs Penfield — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pelican Point, South Australia and Penfield, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pelican Point and Penfield have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Pelican Point or Penfield safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pelican Point has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Penfield scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pelican Point scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Penfield scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pelican Point or Penfield?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pelican Point has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
